title: Piquant British Paella Rice Spotted Dick
description: A kid-friendly British dish featuring paella rice, with a citrusy and aerated twist, made in a spotted dick form and deep-fry-tod for a low-carb friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked paella rice, lemon zest, orange zest, mixed spice, and currants.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and granulated sweetener until well combined.
Add the melted butter and suet to the egg mixture and stir until smooth.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a sticky dough forms.
Transfer the dough to a spotted dick mold or a small pudding basin.
Cover the mold with parchment paper and steam the pudding for 20 minutes.
Remove the pudding from the mold and deep-fry at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Drain the pudding on paper towels and serve warm.
